synopsis:
Issue 6 of 6 from Marvel Comics Obi-Wan Kenobi adaptation miniseries. This issue is an adaptation of the fifth episode of the television series Obi-Wan Kenobi.
OBI-WAN realizes saving LEIA isn't enough – he must face DARTH VADER once more! Meanwhile, REVA has found her ultimate bargaining chip: LUKE SKYWALKER!
title: Obi-Wan Kenobi #6
